key.name: timestamp-format
key.summary: Format string for auto-added timestamp annotation

key.name: auto-save-enabled
key.summary: Auto-save project after each annotation change

key.name: auto-export-enabled
key.summary: Auto-export annotated image after each annotation change

key.name: auto-export-suffix
key.summary: Suffix appended to filename during auto-export

key.name: auto-clipboard-enabled
key.summary: Auto-copy annotated image to clipboard after each change

key.name: post-capture-editing-disabled
key.summary: Skip opening editor after capture when launched with --capture

key.name: post-capture-editing-temporary-enabled
key.summary: Temporarily skip opening editor after capture

key.name: post-capture-editing-temporary-started-at
key.summary: Epoch seconds when temporary skip was enabled

key.name: open-new-window-on-capture
key.summary: Open a new window instead of replacing current capture
